questionHtml:
Which is the hierarchy of taxa in order of increasing numbers of species?

A. genus, family, order, class

B. class, order, genus, family

C. genus, family, class, order

D. class, order, family, genus

meta.title: Which is the hierarchy of taxa in order of increasing numbers of species? A. genus, family, order, class B. class, order, genus, family C. genus, family, class, order D. class, ord
